overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city district at dusk. The character passes under a large red torii gate, continues past the Kennedy Ave sign, and approaches an intersection with palm trees, surrounded by futuristic architecture and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk residential street approaching landmark gate

events.description: slight rightward curve in sidewalk path as character approaches the torii gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward the illuminated red torii gate in the distance

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street with headlights on, moving in same direction as ego

entered.detail: green-tinted curved residential building with multiple balconies and external staircases
tall wooden utility pole with multiple crossbars and hanging electrical wires
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying product images on building facade
large traditional Japanese gate structure with red neon illumination along the pillars

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cyberpunk city street flanked by curved residential buildings and utility poles. A large red neon-lit torii gate stands prominently in the distance, while digital billboards and street lamps line the path. Vehicles drive along the adjacent road as the character approaches the landmark gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district under illuminated torii gate

events.description: character passes underneath the large red torii gate structure
view briefly blocked by the thick pillar of the torii gate when passing close by

agents.ego_description: walking under the torii gate and continuing along the sidewalk past various neon storefront signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a yellow jacket walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large multi-story industrial building with illuminated windows and geometric facade
street sign reading 'Kennedy Ave' mounted on a metal pole with red neon border
circular neon sign with ramen bowl image and green directional arrows
elevated roadway structure running parallel to the street in the background

segments.scene_description: The character passes beneath the massive red torii gate, transitioning into a commercial zone with prominent neon signage. The Kennedy Ave street sign becomes visible on the right, while an industrial complex rises on the left. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket walks past in the opposite direction as the character continues down the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with ventilation structures and elevated railway

events.description: entering narrower street section with industrial warehouse architecture
lighting becomes darker as character walks under building overhangs

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial buildings and large ventilation structures along the sidewalk

entered.detail: building facade with large circular industrial ventilation shafts stacked vertically
illuminated vertical kiosk displaying an animated advertisement with a human face
tall industrial tower structure with the number 12 illuminated on the side

segments.scene_description: The street narrows into an industrial zone characterized by large ventilation shafts on the right and warehouse buildings on the left. A digital advertisement kiosk stands on the sidewalk, while an industrial tower with the number 12 becomes visible in the distance. The elevated highway runs parallel on the right side as the lighting dims under building overhangs.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with palm trees and pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: street opens up to wider intersection with visible palm trees and crosswalk
character approaches crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching and beginning to cross the street intersection at the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street ahead of the character at the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the median and far side of the intersection
zebra crossing markings on the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide intersection lined with palm trees against the dusk sky. The character approaches the crosswalk markings on the road as the industrial buildings recede into the background. The elevated highway becomes more prominent on the right, while a pedestrian crosses ahead and vehicles navigate the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense cyberpunk district that transitions from a residential street into a wide, palm-lined intersection at dusk. It begins by following a character along a narrow path flanked by curved buildings and digital billboards, moving steadily toward a massive, red neon-lit torii gate. As the character passes beneath the gate, the environment shifts into a commercial zone marked by the Kennedy Ave sign and an industrial complex, where a pedestrian in a yellow jacket crosses their path. The scene then narrows into a dim industrial corridor characterized by large ventilation shafts and a distant tower labeled 12, with an elevated highway running parallel to the sidewalk. Finally, the space opens up into a broad intersection where the industrial architecture recedes, revealing palm trees against the twilight sky as the character approaches the crosswalk.
